footer.tagline: Connecting Syrian exporters with global buyers — deal by deal.

common.terms: By registering you agree to our Terms of Service

home.title: Connecting Syrian Excellence to Global Markets
home.h1: Connecting Syrian producers with global buyers
home.subtitle: The structured B2B gateway for Syrian export: list your company, check market readiness, and match supply with demand — in English and Arabic.
home.exporterLead: You have the products. We help the right buyers find you.
home.exporterB1: List products, certifications, and capacity in the public directory
home.exporterB2: Score export readiness for Germany, the UAE, and 35 other markets
home.exporterB3: See live import requests from buyers in your sector
home.importerLead: Source from Syria with profiles you can actually evaluate.
home.importerB1: Search exporters by sector, location, and certification
home.importerB2: Post sourcing requests with specs and quantities
home.importerB3: Connect directly with reviewed Syrian companies
home.demandBody: See what international buyers are sourcing right now.
home.howExporter2: Check readiness for your target markets
home.howExporter3: Connect when buyers match your offer
home.howImporter1: Tell us your market and categories
home.howImporter2: Browse the directory or post a request
home.howImporter3: Review exporter profiles and reach out
home.whyBody: Syrian producers excel in olive oil and agriculture, Damascus rose and natural cosmetics, handwoven textiles and artisanal crafts, with growing food-processing capacity. SBG brings these suppliers into one searchable gateway.
home.trustBeta: We're in beta — profiles are reviewed manually and features expand regularly.
home.trustBilingual: Full English and Arabic support, including right-to-left layout.
home.finalBody: Register in minutes, save your progress, and resume anytime.

role.title: How will you use the platform?
role.subtitle: Choose your role so we can tailor your experience
role.exporterDesc: I have Syrian products and want to reach international markets
role.importerDesc: I want to source quality Syrian products for my market

wizard.detailsHeading: Tell us more about your company
wizard.exportStageHeading: Where are you in your export journey?
wizard.doneBody: Thanks — your profile is saved. Our team will review it and you'll be matched with relevant buyers.

directory.title: Exporter Directory
directory.subtitle: Browse verified Syrian exporters by sector, market and readiness.
directory.mapSubtitle: Where listed exporters are based, by governorate. Hover a marker to see who's there.

signin.title: Sign in to SBG
signin.subtitle: Sign in with your email and password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.body: Your matches, readiness score and development plan will appear here.
dashboard.readinessCardBody: Score your company against a target market and get a plan to close the gap.
dashboard.requestsCardBody: Post what you want to source and manage your open requests.

readiness.title: Export Readiness
readiness.subtitle: Score your company against a target market's certifications, standards and documentation — then act on the gaps.
readiness.gaps: Priority actions to close the gap
readiness.noTargets: Add target markets to your profile, or pick any market below.
readiness.exportersOnly: Export readiness is available to exporter accounts.

requests.title: Import Requests
requests.subtitle: Browse what international buyers want to source from Syria.
requests.noResults: No open requests match your filters.

requestForm.manageSubtitle: Post what you want to source from Syrian exporters, then manage your open requests.
requestForm.importersOnly: Posting import requests is available to importer accounts.
requestForm.fTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Bulk extra-virgin olive oil, 2 containers
requestForm.none: You haven't posted any requests yet.
